blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Skibowl is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,730 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 10.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 30".
